name: From Trajectories to Instructions: Language-Conditioned Meta-Reinforcement Learning

description: arXiv:2607.18830v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning (MAML) is a widely used framework for reinforcement learning (RL) that enables efficient transfer by learning global policy parameters that can be rapidly adapted to new tasks. MAML training proceeds in two loops: an inner loop where the global parameters are adapted to task-specific parameters, and an outer loop whe...
author: Garvit Singla, Uma Maheswari Natarajan, Raghuram Bharadwaj Diddigi
